title: Deep clone with circular reference handling
system: You are a senior TypeScript developer. Always export your functions. Never add comments to code.
user:
Create and export a function `deepClone` that deep-clones an object, handling circular references.

Requirements:
1. Function signature: `export function deepClone<T>(obj: T): T`
2. Create a deep copy of the object
3. Handle circular references by replacing them with empty objects
4. Handle null/undefined input
5. Use a WeakMap to track already-cloned objects

Only output the function code. Make sure to use `export` keyword.
